'''vazhazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylochrome|xylochrome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylochrome|xylochrome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazhazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzhæzhæth|væzhæzhæth]] || [[word:væzhæzhæj|væzhæzhæj]] || [[word:væzhæzhæsh|væzhæzhæsh]] || [[word:væzhæzhæ|væzhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazhazhazhath|vazhazhazhath]] || [[word:vazhazhazhaj|vazhazhazhaj]] || [[word:vazhazhazhash|vazhazhazhash]] || [[word:vazhazhazha|vazhazhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazhazhath|vazhazhath]] || [[word:vazhazhaj|vazhazhaj]] || [[word:vazhazhash|vazhazhash]] || [[word:vazhazha|vazhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazhafzhath|vazhafzhath]] || [[word:vazhafzhaj|vazhafzhaj]] || [[word:vazhafzhash|vazhafzhash]] || [[word:vazhafzhaf|vazhafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazhazhatha|vazhazhatha]] || [[word:vazhazhaja|vazhazhaja]] || [[word:vazhazhasha|vazhazhasha]] || [[word:vazhazhaka|vazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazhazhath|vazhazhath]] || [[word:vazhazhaj|vazhazhaj]] || [[word:vazhazhash|vazhazhash]] || [[word:vazhazha|vazhazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazhazhathal|vazhazhathal]] || [[word:vazhazhajal|vazhazhajal]] || [[word:vazhazhashal|vazhazhashal]] || [[word:vazhazhakal|vazhazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazhazhathatha|vazhazhathatha]] || [[word:vazhazhajaja|vazhazhajaja]] || [[word:vazhazhashasha|vazhazhashasha]] || [[word:vazhazhaka|vazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazhazhathan|vazhazhathan]] || [[word:vazhazhajan|vazhazhajan]] || [[word:vazhazhashan|vazhazhashan]] || [[word:vazhazhakan|vazhazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazhazhathaoro|vazhazhathaoro]] || [[word:vazhazhajaoro|vazhazhajaoro]] || [[word:vazhazhashaoro|vazhazhashaoro]] || [[word:vazhazhakaoro|vazhazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
